questions.text: She ___ to work by bus every day.
questions.tip: 💡 Dica: Rotinas (always, usually, every day) → Present Simple. Ações no exato momento → am/is/are + verb-ing.

questions.text: Look! The children ___ in the park.
questions.tip: 💡 Dica: Palavras como now, at the moment, look!, listen! pedem am/is/are + verb-ing.
